reasoning: I am voting for Shantanu Thakur and the BJP again because my reason for 2019 still holds true—TMC has not changed one bit. Sandeshkhali, the job scam, these are not new stories, they are the same gundaism I saw with my own nephew years ago. Biswajit Das switching back and forth shows these people are empty shells, they go where the power flows. At least the BJP does not apologise for being what it is, and Shantanu Thakur is from here, from Bangaon. I am not fooled by fourteen CAA certificates handed out five days before voting—I voted in 2019 because I was tired of TMC's corruption, not for any document. That tiredness is still there. I cannot go back.
primary_drivers: TMC's corruption and gundaism remain unchanged (Sandeshkhali, job scandal confirm my 2019 judgment)
Biswajit Das's lack of conviction and spine makes him untrustworthy
BJP's unapologetic Hindu identity and Shantanu Thakur's local roots
